common.tagline: AI-crafted songs for your little one
common.noFavorites: No favorites yet. Start listening and add your favorites!
common.noHistory: No listening history yet. Play some songs!

hero.title: Music made for your baby, powered by AI
hero.subtitle: Lullabies, educational songs, and fun tunes — crafted with artificial intelligence and designed for little ears.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Pick a theme, style, and language for the song
howItWorks.step2Desc: Review the lyrics, then AI creates the full song with audio
howItWorks.step3Desc: Get your MP3 and share a link with family and friends

categories.title: Songs for every moment
categories.lullabiesDesc: Gentle melodies to help your baby drift off to sleep
categories.educationalDesc: Learn colors, numbers, animals, and more through music
categories.funDesc: Upbeat songs for playtime and happy moments

platforms.title: Listen anywhere
platforms.subtitle: Find BabyBeats on your favorite music platform

testimonials.title: Loved by parents everywhere
testimonials.quote1: My daughter falls asleep in minutes with her personalized lullaby. It's like magic having a song with her name in it.
testimonials.quote2: We use the educational songs every morning. My son learned his colors in both Spanish and English!
testimonials.quote3: I gifted a BabyBeats album to my sister for her baby shower. She cried happy tears. Best gift ever.

metadata.defaultTitle: BabyBeats — Personalized songs for your baby
metadata.defaultDescription: Create unique songs with your baby's name using artificial intelligence.
metadata.ogDescription: Lullabies, educational songs, and fun tunes crafted with AI for your baby.
metadata.pricingDescription: First song free. Buy credit packs to create more personalized songs.
metadata.songsDescription: Explore the catalog of baby songs created with artificial intelligence.
metadata.loginDescription: Access your account to listen to and create personalized songs.
metadata.signupDescription: Sign up for free and create your first personalized song for your baby.
metadata.giftDescription: The perfect gift: a personalized song album with the baby's name.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready
pricing.heroTitle: Create personalized songs for your baby
pricing.heroSubtitle: Your first song is free. Buy credit packs to create more.
pricing.firstSongFreeDesc: Sign up and create your first personalized baby song at no cost
pricing.firstSongFreeDescLoggedIn: Create your first personalized baby song at no cost

create.title: Create a song for your baby
create.childHint: This name will appear in the lyrics of the song
create.customPlaceholder: e.g., include animals, mention bedtime, about counting to 10...
create.previewHint: Review the lyrics, then generate the audio
create.needCredits: You need credits to generate audio
create.modeTitle: What do you want to create?
create.albumQuickDesc: We pick the best mix of themes and styles
create.albumCustomDesc: Choose theme and style per song

generating.title: Creating your song...
generating.patience: This usually takes 1-3 minutes. You can leave this page and check "My Songs" later.
generating.created: Your personalized song has been created
generating.failedHint: The audio generation failed. Your credit has not been charged.

platforms.title: Listen on your favorite platform
platforms.subtitle: Download the MP3 and add it to Spotify or Apple Music to listen alongside your music

spotify.title: Add to Spotify
spotify.step2: Open Spotify on your computer (desktop app)
spotify.step3: Go to Settings > Local Files > Turn on
spotify.step4: Add the folder where you saved the MP3
spotify.step5: The song appears in "Local Files" — add it to any playlist
spotify.step6: On your phone, download the playlist on WiFi to listen offline

apple.title: Add to Apple Music
apple.step2: Open the Music app (or iTunes) on your computer
apple.step3: Drag the MP3 into your library
apple.step4: The song syncs automatically to all your devices via iCloud
apple.step5: Add it to any playlist alongside your music

mySongs.title: My Songs
mySongs.createFirstPrompt: Create your first personalized baby song!

gift.heroSubtitle: A unique gift with their name in every song. Perfect for baby showers, birthdays, and special moments.
